rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
The current repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There are no Azure DevOps defaults configured, and no Azure DevOps MCP tools are available in this environment.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need either:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL and project configured
2. Azure DevOps MCP tools installed and connected

Please provide:
- Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg`)
- Project name
- Repository name (if different from project)

Or configure defaults with:
```powershell
az devops configure --defaults organization=https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg project=YourProject
```
